title: decaspermum parvifolium
intro: Decaspermum parvifolium, also known as the Australian black bean tree or black bean tree, is a plant species native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Decaspermum parvifolium include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a tincture or capsule form.
